errors.boundary_body: An unexpected error occurred. The rest of the panel still works — try retrying, or reload the page if the issue persists.

panel.actions_help: Create a portable archive of your forum, restore from one, or transfer between Flarum installs.

list.empty: No backups yet. Click 'Create backup' to make one.
list.target_tooltip: This backup's SQL was generated for {engine}. Restore it onto a {engine} install.
list.confirm_delete: Delete this backup permanently? The .flarum file will be removed from the server.
list.load_failed: Could not load the backup list.

encryption.section_help: Encrypt new backups with an asymmetric keypair. The public key lives in the database, the private key MUST be pasted into config.php — the web process never holds a key it has not been told.
encryption.clipboard_unavailable: Your browser does not allow copying to the clipboard. Select the value manually.
encryption.clipboard_failed: Copy failed — your browser blocked clipboard access. Select the value manually.

status.load_failed: Could not load encryption status from the server.
status.libsodium_missing: libsodium is not available on this server. Encryption cannot be enabled.
status.healthy: Encryption is configured. New backups will be encrypted automatically when you tick 'encrypt' in the export modal.
status.not_setup: No encryption keypair has been generated yet. Backups will be saved in plain form unless you opt in per-export.
status.mismatch_body: The private key in config.php does not match the public key stored in the database. Existing encrypted backups cannot be decrypted on this server. Either restore the original private key, or rotate to a fresh keypair (which leaves the existing encrypted files unchanged but unreadable here).
status.private_missing_body: A public key was generated but the matching private key is not in your config.php. Existing encrypted backups will not decrypt here until the private key is restored.

public_key.label: Current public key
public_key.help_healthy: New encrypted backups will be sealed to this key. Anyone with the matching private key can decrypt them.
public_key.help_broken: Encryption is configured but cannot decrypt — see the alert above.

reveal_modal.title: Save your private key
reveal_modal.intro: We just generated a fresh keypair. The private half is shown ONCE below. Paste it into your config.php — we will not be able to show it to you again.
reveal_modal.warning_body: If you lose the private key, every backup encrypted with the matching public key becomes permanently unreadable.
reveal_modal.close: I have saved my private key

regenerate_modal.title: Rotate encryption keypair
regenerate_modal.warning: Generating a new keypair leaves any backups already encrypted with the OLD public key unreadable on this server (you can still decrypt them externally if you saved the old private key). New backups will be encrypted to the new key.
regenerate_modal.acknowledge: I understand and want to rotate.

export_modal.title: Create backup
export_modal.intro: Pick what to bundle. The result is a single .flarum file you can download, transfer, or store off-site.
export_modal.content_db_help: Every table — users, posts, settings, etc. The dump includes DROP/CREATE statements so it can be restored cleanly.
export_modal.content_assets_help: public/assets/ — avatars, attachments, anything users have uploaded.
export_modal.content_storage_help: Usually skipped: contains runtime files that can be regenerated and is rarely portable across installs.
export_modal.content_extensions_help: Bundle the source files of one or more installed extensions (from workbench/ or vendor/). Tick the box and pick which ones below.
export_modal.extensions_none: No extensions are installed on this Flarum.
export_modal.extensions_load_failed: Could not load the extension list.
export_modal.target_help: Where will this backup be restored? Pick the engine of the destination if it's different from this one — the SQL is generated for that engine, so you can migrate from MySQL to PostgreSQL (or any combination) without manual conversion.
export_modal.encryption_help: Uses libsodium hybrid encryption. The body is encrypted with a per-archive symmetric key, which is then sealed with a public key.
export_modal.encryption_external: Encrypt to a different public key (for transfer)
export_modal.encryption_external_help: Paste the destination server's public key. Useful when preparing a backup to restore somewhere else without sharing private keys.
export_modal.cancel_failed_warn: Modal closed, but the server may still be holding the export job lock. Check the backup list shortly — if a stale job persists, retry or contact support.
export_modal.phase_error_network: Lost connection to the server during the backup. The job may still be running on the server — check the backup list shortly.
export_modal.warnings_title: {count, plural, one {# translation warning} other {# translation warnings}}
export_modal.warnings_help: Some columns use types that don't have a direct equivalent on the chosen target engine. The backup itself completes — but the destination column may not validate or behave identically. Review each note below before relying on this backup for migration.

import_modal.title: Import a backup
import_modal.warning_body: Importing a backup overwrites the database and replaces files. Make sure you have a recent backup of THIS install first.
import_modal.upload_idle_timeout: The upload stalled (no data sent for over a minute). Check your network and try again.
import_modal.extensions_composer_note: composer.json and composer.lock are bundled and will overwrite the destination's project root. Run `composer install` after restoring to materialise vendor extensions.
import_modal.selection_help: Pick which sections of this backup to apply. Anything you uncheck will be skipped at restore time — the corresponding files / database changes are simply not applied.
import_modal.key_help: This archive is encrypted. Paste the matching base64 private key — it stays in this browser session and is sent ONCE to the server for the restore.
import_modal.key_hint_local: Leave blank to use the private key configured in this server's config.php.
import_modal.confirm_body: Tables in the archive replace tables here. Files are written to their original paths.
import_modal.confirm_check: I understand. Replace my current data with this backup.
import_modal.cancel_failed_warn: Modal closed, but the server may still be applying changes. Verify the server state before retrying.
import_modal.reload_required: The forum data has been replaced. Reload the page to continue with a fresh session — your previous login may have been replaced too.
import_modal.done_body: All selected files have been restored. The database was not modified, so your current session is unchanged.
import_modal.logout_body: Restoring the database replaced this server's `users` and `sessions` tables, so the account you were signed in with no longer exists here. Sign in again with the credentials of the imported forum to continue.
import_modal.logout_step_reload: Reload the page below to clear the stale session cookie
import_modal.logout_step_login: Log in with the admin credentials of the source forum
import_modal.phase_error_network: Lost connection to the server during restore. The server may still be writing — wait a moment and check the database state before retrying.
import_modal.url_rewrite_note: URLs in the database referencing the source server will be rewritten to this server's URL automatically.
